name: Paladin
description: A durable holy knight who fights and heals in equal measure. Paladins mend with lay on hands, guard with divine shield and smite the undead; note that smite only strikes undead, so rely on your weapon against the living. At level 15 they learn guardian aura, warding the whole party behind a golden aegis, and at level 30 holy wrath, a searing holy strike that brands any foe and burns away their guard, then at level 45 consecration, hallowing the ground in a burst of holy light that sears every foe in the room, then at level 60 avenging wrath, a self-buff that wreathes the paladin in righteous fury, spiking their own damage and healing output for its duration, and at level 75 the hammer of justice, the paladin's first control tool: a stunning strike of holy force that briefly incapacitates a single foe, then at level 85 crusade, the paladin's first group offensive buff: a rallying call to holy war that sharpens the whole party's strikes to a keen, unerring edge.
